name: Story
description: Story is the first thing you do. Consists of 4 different maps, each with 6 acts and one infinite stage. (Infinite unlocks after beating all 6 acts on Nightmare).

name: Raids
description: Unlocked at level 15. Includes 8 different raids varying in difficulty and rewards. Features infinite stages with modifiers.

name: Challenges
description: Refresh every 20 minutes. Offers various rewards like Stat Rerolls and Mystic Coins.

name: Tower Adventures
description: Features 2 different stages with infinite scaling. Rewards increase as you progress further through the tower acts.

name: Vampire Castle Act
description: Drop Rate: 97/100. Obtained from Lawless City Raid at a 50% chance. 15 wave gamemode dropping Alucord Gun (1%) and Limit Breakers.

name: Jeju Island
description: Portal obtained by completing the dedicated quest. 30 Waves dropping Igros and Bero equipment at 10% chance.

name: Mystery Portal
description: Obtained through Orc Raid. 30 waves dropping Rubber Fruit (2%) and Mystery Keys (2%).

name: Cog Portal
description: Dropped from Temple Portal at a 3% chance. 30 waves, dropping special Cog materials.

name: Gates
description: Darkness Gate (Lv. 30+) - Difficulty: Eternal Curse. Spawn every 20 minutes for 6 players. Eternal Curse difficulty doubles drops.

name: Ragna Event
description: 50 Wave gamemode where you must defeat Gilzea. Includes unique drops like the Silver Saint Core.

name: JoJo Event
description: 100 waves. Beating D4C Boss early (wave 30/60) results in instant victory. Chests drop craft materials for JoJo units.

name: Castorice (Mushroom Rush)
description: Features two raids (Mushroom Rush and Verdant Shroud). Includes a special event shop with bundles and Robin (HSR).

name: Jujutsu Kaisen Event
description: 50 Waves (Shibuya). Face Mahoraga and Sukuna. Drops Cursed Energy and Malevolent Shrine materials.

name: CSM Event
description: 50 Waves (Chainsaw Man). Features Easy, Hard, and Hell difficulties with scaling currency and capsule drops.

name: World Boss event
description: Battle Gun Devil over 50 waves. Rotates rewards every hour including unique capsules and CSM coins.

name: World Rush
description: Fight Cartethiya and Fleurdelys to acquire the Crown of Fleurdelys. Enemies feature 95% Damage Reduction.

name: Chronicles Of Timeless Eternity 1
description: Features Frieren. Survive 50 waves against bosses that stun your units. Essential for Frieren evolution.

name: Chronicles Of Timeless Eternity 2
description: Features Kurumi. Destroy clocks around the map to negate SPA debuffs and locate the real Kurumi among clones.

name: Fate x 02 1
description: Gilgamesh path. Destroy gates to unlock new map sections and reach the boss for Enuma Elish drops.

name: Fate x 02 2
description: Saber path. Challenge powerful enemies across 50 waves to obtain Aegis Of Morgan and Excalibur Morgan.

name: Fate x 02 3
description: Zero Two path. Collect Hamburger items and attempt to obtain Strelitzia or the Zero Two (002) unit.

name: Over Heaven Event
description: Defeat Dio and Pucci in a specialized lobby stage. Collect Presents scattered around the map for extra currency.

name: Devourer Throne
description: Enemies have 90% Defense and Skill immunity. Choose Rimuru, Ainz, or Kaneki teams to assist in the fight against Dragon Kakuja.

name: Wordline (Double Dungeon)
description: 50 waves. Boss attacks your units at wave 30. Drops high-tier materials like Frostbite Nova.

name: Wordline (Cid Cavern)
description: 50 waves. Cid boss nukes units at wave 5 and 10. Use active skills at the start of wave 6 to survive.

name: Worldline (Lingxian Academy)
description: 50 waves on a 3-path map. Drops include Cursed Mask and Heavenly Chair.

name: Wordline (Lingxian Yard)
description: 50 Waves mode. Drop table features Claymore, Golden Greatsword, and Ice Spirit artifacts.

name: Wordline (Forbidden Forest)
description: 30 intense waves with unique shield mechanics (Green, Pink, Red) affecting enemy regeneration and skill damage.

name: Shinra Event
description: Part of Three World Bosses. Enemies gain 90% Damage Reduction. Units receive constant cooldown penalties during the fight.

name: Broly Event
description: Part of Three World Bosses. Features massive damage reduction. Destroy crystals around the map to weaken Broly.

name: Jin Mori Event
description: Part of Three World Bosses. Destroy Cudgels to remove boss invulnerability. Battle features heavy cooldown debuffs.

name: Trinity of  Destruction (Shibuya)
description: Enemies have health 'Stacks'. Beating this mode drops the Shibuya portal and Cursed Energy.

name: Trinity of  Destruction (Soul Society)
description: Face Staked health enemies to obtain Soul Society Sealed District portals and Cursed Energy.

name: Soul society sealed district  portal
description: Drop Rate: 1/100. Rewards: Azure Judgement, All-Seeing Abyss. Bosses: Aizen (Final Muken) and Yhwach (Soul King).

name: Wordline (Seven Sins Town)
description: 30 intense waves where waypoints are randomized at the start. Look for the 'Path chosen!' Drops include 1% Meliodas (Assault), 25% Seven Sins Chest, 2.5% Sins Town: Arthur/Meliodas/Escanor (Portal and Hawk Coins.

name: Shibuya portal
description: Drop Rate: 1/100. Rewards: Yuji Modulo. Boss: Yuji (Modulo). Higher drop chance for the host.
